business_ideas.idea: Vertical farming direct-to-consumer subscription for ultra-fresh produce
Hardware and robotics lab/incubator space for early-stage hardware founders
Commodity hardware plus machine learning fitness device (computer vision coach)
Brain-computer interface device for focus measurement and thought-based control

predictions.text: Vertical farming will scale to major cities via distributed warehouse farms
Hardware startups need physical maker spaces to compete with well-funded labs
Commodity hardware plus ML will create entirely new product categories
Brain-computer interfaces will move from research to consumer products
